name: Llama 3.1
tagline: 8B, 70B and the frontier-scale 405B; 128K context and eight-language support — the first open frontier-level Llama model.
metaDescription: Llama 3.1 (Meta), released 2024-07-23 — part of the Llama 3 line. 8B, 70B and the frontier-scale 405B; 128K context and eight-language support — the first open…
overview: Llama 3.1 is a large language model from Meta, part of the Llama 3 line. Released 2024-07-23. The previous-generation open-weight dense (text and vision) Llama line, spanning the 3.0 through 3.3 point releases.
What's notable in this version: 8B, 70B and the frontier-scale 405B; 128K context and eight-language support — the first open frontier-level Llama model.
